findings.text: Email from Edinburgh Napier University to Anfal Elbushra references an attached PDF named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB).
Binary extraction tool not available in current harness. No extraction performed. Requires configured tool to extract embedded PDF from original source files.

proposed_artifacts.content:
# Binary Extraction Result

**Task:** Extract embedded Student Licence PDF from original PDF sources.

**Status:** Not performed. The binary extraction tool is not available in the current harness.

**Evidence:** The extracted text from NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029 confirms an email attachment named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB).

**Next Step:** Use a configured binary extraction tool (e.g., `pdfdetach`, `pdftk`, or custom script) on the original PDF files at:
- `01-sources/contracts-and-accommodation/NAP-SRC-0028 - Edinburgh Napier University Tenancy Agreement 2025-26.pdf`
- `01-sources/communications/NAP-SRC-0029 - Email - Elbushra, Anfal - Outlook.pdf`
proposed_artifacts.title: Extraction result placeholder

proposed_tasks.instructions: Use a configured binary extraction tool (e.g., pdfdetach, pdftk, or custom script) to extract the embedded 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' from the original PDF sources NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029. Save the extracted PDF as a new source artifact.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract embedded Student Licence PDF using binary extraction tool

summary: Task requires binary extraction of an embedded Student Licence PDF from original PDF sources. The extracted text from NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029 shows an email referencing a 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' attachment, but the binary extraction tool is not available in the current harness. No binary extraction was performed. A follow-up task is proposed to use a configured binary extraction tool on the original PDF files.

uncertainties.reason: Binary extraction tool not configured or available in this harness; cannot extract the embedded Student Licence PDF.
